_label_tier_note: MY Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status. Current strict tier was realigned after SA/US precision guards; ideal_must_detect preserves removed strict spans for gap review.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: MY Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

global_stale_strict_realign.reason: Current precision guards suppress these spans; strict must_detect was realigned while ideal_must_detect preserved the broader auto-label signal.

_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed SA/US Stage B detector precision fixes

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet: Proposed strategic acquisition by Orion Accretive Berhad (Main Market, Bursa Malaysia) of 70% equity in Kelana Digital Utilities Sdn Bhd via subscription and purchase.
Security and audits: No known personal data breach or leak has been identified in public audit summaries for the last 24 months; this statement is not an admission of liability.
Financing: Facilities to be arranged by Blue Parakeet Bank Berhad; no bank account numbers or payment identifiers are provided or required by this term sheet.
Cross-border transfer of limited HR/payroll fields to a group processor outside Malaysia has been approved
